steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage moves from describing her general practice of sculpting hair into “all kinds of shapes” to presenting a specific example: hair shaped as Africa. This general-to-specific pattern signals a need for an example-introduction transition.

steps.title: Match the transition
steps.content: “For example,” is the only transition that introduces a specific example supporting the general claim. The others signal different relationships—time progression, location shift, or contrast—that don't fit here. That confirms C is correct.
